token.title: Verification Token
token.description: Paste a verification token from PerfectDraft's website. See the [setup instructions](https://github.com/Falkvinge/hassio-integration-perfectdraft-pro#step-2-verification-token) for the 30-second walkthrough. The token expires in 2 minutes, so generate it right before pasting.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PerfectDraft
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your credentials.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Token may have expired (2 min limit) or credentials are wrong. Try again with a fresh token.

abort.already_configured: This PerfectDraft account is already configured.
